top_signals.title: The American Military’s Coming Marathon
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon needs both quantity and quality to win modern conflicts.

top_signals.title: Honeywell-Backed Quantinuum Shares Jump 13% After Upsized IPO
top_signals.summary: Quantinuum Inc., a quantum computing company backed by Honeywell International Inc., opened 13% above its listing price after raising $1.68 billion in an upsized US initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Broadcom Sparks AI Rally Fears | Open Interest 6/4/2026
top_signals.summary:
AI euphoria hits a reality check as Broadcom’s weak outlook reignites fears the chip-fueled rally has gone too far. Plus, Jamie Dimon pitches the SpaceX IPO to the bank's high-net-worth clients.  Blackstone’s private credit fund limits redemptions for the first time, VistaJet’s Leona Qi join us on the private aviation boom, Ciena CEO Gary Smith joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" on surging AI network demand, and Education Under Secretary Nicholas Kent discusses the future of struggling colleges.

Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
